title: Load homepage and verify header + hero are visible
description: Verifies the public homepage loads successfully and key above-the-fold content is visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify URL contains "/"
Verify element "homepage header" is visible
Verify element "hero section" is visible
Scroll to the middle of the homepage
Verify element "main homepage content" is visible

title: Scroll through homepage content
description: Verifies the visitor can scroll and continue to see content sections as they move down the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify element "homepage header" is visible
Scroll to the bottom of the homepage
Verify element "footer" is visible
Scroll to the top of the homepage
Verify element "hero section" is visible

title: Use header navigation link from homepage
description: Verifies clicking a header navigation link produces a visible navigation response on the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify element "homepage header" is visible
Click on the first visible header navigation link
Verify URL contains "/"
Verify element "target section heading related to the clicked header link" is visible
Scroll slightly to confirm the page position has changed

title: Toggle Dark Mode on and verify dark styling is applied
description: Verifies enabling Dark Mode changes the visible appearance of the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify element "Dark Mode toggle control" is visible
Click on the "Dark Mode" toggle control
Verify element "Dark Mode enabled state indicator" is visible
Verify element "page background in dark mode" is visible
Verify element "header in dark mode" is visible

title: Toggle Dark Mode on then off and verify light styling is restored
description: Verifies Dark Mode can be toggled twice to return the page to its original (light) appearance.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify element "Dark Mode toggle control" is visible
Click on the "Dark Mode" toggle control
Verify element "Dark Mode enabled state indicator" is visible
Click on the "Dark Mode" toggle control again
Verify element "Dark Mode enabled state indicator" is not visible
Verify element "page background in light mode" is visible

title: Verify test homepage loads for QA fallback access
description: Verifies the dedicated test homepage route is accessible and renders content for QA/troubleshooting.

steps.description: Navigate to /test_homepage.php
Verify URL contains "/test_homepage.php"
Verify element "test homepage main content" is visible
Verify text "test" is visible
Scroll to the bottom of the test homepage
Verify element "test homepage footer or end-of-page content" is visible

title: Add product to cart and complete checkout
description: Verifies that a user can add a product to the cart, proceed to checkout, and place an order.

steps.description: Navigate to /shop
Verify element "grid of products" is visible
Click on the "Add to cart" button for the first available product
Verify a "View cart" link or success message appears
Navigate to /checkout
Verify the checkout form is visible
Fill in the required billing details with dummy test data (Name: Test, Email: test@example.com, Address, etc.)
Click on the "Place order" button
Verify the "Order received" or success page is visible
